examples: Yeah. He always tickled my finny bone with his college stories.
Luckily for Dave and his son Finny, a couple of clumsy Nestrians, an Ark has been built to save all animals.
The narrator Gene an introverted studious Southerner recalls his relationship with his best friend Phineas known as "Finny" a charismatic gregarious athlete.
Were Gene and Finny friends or frenemies in A Separate Peace?
